Event: The Animated Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 03/07/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR427
Giant Hunter Gear

With a 70% chance, one of three effects occurs when attacking:
- The fighter removes a small number of random negative effects from themselves and all allied fighters within a small radius of 4 and the targets restore 40% health.
- The fighter and all allied fighters within a small radius receive a shield that blocks 3 any attacks. The shield lasts no longer than 5 seconds. A maximum of 3 effects.
- The fighter increases all parameters for themselves and all allied fighters within a small radius by 25% for 5 seconds. A maximum of 5 effects.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌗
